display_name: Kimi K2.5 is an advanced mixture-of-experts (MoE) language model that builds on the K2 architecture with enhanced reasoning, coding, and long-context capabilities. With tens of billions of activated p
description: Kimi K2.5 is an advanced mixture-of-experts (MoE) language model that builds on the K2 architecture with enhanced reasoning, coding, and long-context capabilities. With tens of billions of activated parameters and over a trillion total parameters, Kimi K2.5 is trained using optimized large-scale training techniques to deliver stronger performance across complex problem-solving, frontier knowledge, and agentic workflows, while improving efficiency, stability, and real-world applicability.
